subject: Submitting claim for orthopaedic surgery
body_text:
Hello,

I would like to submit a claim for orthopaedic knee surgery I had at Beacon Hospital on 14 February 2026.
The total invoice amount was EUR 3,450.00 and I have attached the consultant receipt and discharge summary.
My policy number is POL-IE-334782 and my member ID is MEM-000101.
Please let me know if you need any additional documentation to process this claim.

Kind regards,
Aoife Murphy
body_html:
Hello,

I would like to submit a claim for orthopaedic knee surgery I had at Beacon Hospital on 14 February 2026.
The total invoice amount was EUR 3,450.00 and I have attached the consultant receipt and discharge summary.
My policy number is POL-IE-334782 and my member ID is MEM-000101.
Please let me know if you need any additional documentation to process this claim.

Kind regards,
Aoife Murphy

subject: Dental invoice claim submission
body_text:
Hi,

I am writing to submit a dental claim for treatment I received on 20 January 2026 at Grafton Dental Clinic, Dublin.
The treatment involved a root canal and crown fitting. Total cost was EUR 890.00.
I have enclosed the dental invoice (invoice number INV-DEN-20260120) and my membership certificate.
Policy number: POL-IE-556123.

Thank you,
Cian O'Brien
body_html:

Cian O'Brien

body_text:
Good morning,

I am submitting a claim for five physiotherapy sessions attended at CityPhysio Dublin between 3 January and 7 February 2026.
Total amount claimed is EUR 425.00. My physiotherapist is Dr. Sean Walsh.
I have attached all five session receipts and my GP referral letter.
Member ID: MEM-000303, Policy: POL-IE-771045.

Regards,
Niamh Kelly

subject: Urgent: Cancer treatment claim - large amount
body_text:
Dear Claims Team,

I am submitting an urgent claim for oncology treatment I received at St Vincent's Hospital between October and December 2025.
The total treatment costs amount to EUR 28,500.00 across three invoices (chemotherapy, radiology, and consultant fees).
I have attached all three invoices and my consultant's referral letter.
I would appreciate if this could be processed as a priority given the ongoing nature of my treatment.
Policy: POL-IE-882344, Member: MEM-000404.

Thank you,
Declan Brennan
body_html:
Dear Claims Team,

I am submitting an urgent claim for oncology treatment I received at St Vincent's Hospital between October and December 2025.
The total treatment costs amount to EUR 28,500.00 across three invoices (chemotherapy, radiology, and consultant fees).
I have attached all three invoices and my consultant's referral letter.
I would appreciate if this could be processed as a priority given the ongoing nature of my treatment.
Policy: POL-IE-882344, Member: MEM-000404.

Thank you,
Declan Brennan

body_text:

I need to submit claims for a number of GP and specialist consultations I attended in February 2026.
GP visit on 5 Feb (EUR 65.00), and specialist gastroenterologist appointment at Mater Private on 19 Feb (EUR 220.00).
I attach both receipts.
My policy number is POL-IE-993421.

Thanks,

subject: Status update on claim CLM-20260115
body_text:
Hello,

I submitted a claim with reference CLM-20260115 on 15 January 2026 for outpatient surgery.
It has now been over six weeks and I have not received any payment or update.
Could you please provide a status update on when this will be processed?
My policy number is POL-IE-112233.

Kind regards,
Fionn Gallagher

subject: Following up on reimbursement for out-of-network consultant
body_text:
Dear Support,

I attended an out-of-network consultant (Dr. Patrick Quinn, Consultant Cardiologist) at his private rooms on 10 February 2026.
I have already submitted the claim but am querying the reimbursement amount - the partial payment received (EUR 150.00) seems lower than I expected given my plan.
Could you clarify the reimbursement rate applicable and whether I can appeal?
Policy: POL-IE-445566.

Best regards,
Roisin Fitzpatrick
body_html:
Dear Support,

I attended an out-of-network consultant (Dr. Patrick Quinn, Consultant Cardiologist) at his private rooms on 10 February 2026.
I have already submitted the claim but am querying the reimbursement amount - the partial payment received (EUR 150.00) seems lower than I expected given my plan.
Could you clarify the reimbursement rate applicable and whether I can appeal?
Policy: POL-IE-445566.

Best regards,
Roisin Fitzpatrick

subject: Pre-authorisation needed for hip replacement
body_text:
Hello,

My orthopaedic consultant has recommended a total hip replacement at Bon Secours Hospital Cork.
The procedure is provisionally scheduled for 22 April 2026.
I understand I need pre-authorisation before proceeding. Could you please advise on the process and the documents required?
Policy: POL-IE-667788, Member: MEM-000808.

Thank you,
Cathal O'Sullivan
body_html:

My orthopaedic consultant has recommended a total hip replacement at Bon Secours Hospital Cork.

Thank you,
Cathal O'Sullivan

subject: Pre-auth request for MRI scan - urgent
body_text:
Dear Authorisations Team,

My GP has referred me urgently for an MRI scan of my lumbar spine following a road traffic accident.
The scan is proposed at Upmc Whitfield Hospital Waterford next week.
I need to know if pre-authorisation is required and if so, what is the turnaround time for approval?
This is time-sensitive as my GP has advised the scan is medically urgent.
Policy: POL-IE-998877.

Thank you,
Maeve O'Connor
body_html:
Dear Authorisations Team,

My GP has referred me urgently for an MRI scan of my lumbar spine following a road traffic accident.
The scan is proposed at Upmc Whitfield Hospital Waterford next week.

This is time-sensitive as my GP has advised the scan is medically urgent.
Policy: POL-IE-998877.

Thank you,
Maeve O'Connor

subject: Query about my renewal premium increase
body_text:
Hello,

I have just received my renewal notice for 2026-2027 and I was surprised to see a significant premium increase of 14% compared to last year.
My current plan is Family Plus and I have been a customer for over six years.
Could you explain what is driving this increase and whether there are any options to reduce my premium?
Policy: POL-IE-223344.

Kind regards,
Eoin Byrne
body_html:
Hello,

I have just received my renewal notice for 2026-2027 and I was surprised to see a significant premium increase of 14% compared to last year.
My current plan is Family Plus and I have been a customer for over six years.
Could you explain what is driving this increase and whether there are any options to reduce my premium?
Policy: POL-IE-223344.

Kind regards,
Eoin Byrne

subject: Confirming renewal and asking about cover changes
body_text:
Hi,

I am due to renew my HealthWise Gold policy on 1 May 2026.
I would like to confirm that renewing automatically will preserve all my existing benefits, including my outpatient cover and dental benefit.
Also, I noticed there is a new Everyday Care plan advertised. Could you compare it with my current plan so I can make an informed decision?
Policy: POL-IE-334455.

Thanks,
Caoimhe Doyle
body_html:

I am due to renew my HealthWise Gold policy on 1 May 2026.

Policy: POL-IE-334455.

Thanks,
Caoimhe Doyle

subject: When does my policy renew and can I defer?
body_text:
Hello,

I'm trying to find out the exact renewal date for my policy number POL-IE-445566.
I think it is coming up in April but I am not sure of the exact date.
Also, if I am travelling abroad at the time, is there any option to defer the renewal by a couple of weeks?

Best,
Padraig Nolan

subject: What does my plan cover for mental health?
body_text:
Hello,

I am considering seeing a psychologist privately and I would like to understand what cover my plan provides for mental health outpatient sessions.
My plan is Corporate Flex (policy POL-IE-556677).
Specifically, I would like to know: the number of sessions covered per year, whether a GP referral is required, and if there is an annual limit.

Thank you,
Sorcha Ryan

subject: Is maternity cover included in my Essential Care plan?
body_text:

My wife and I are planning to start a family and I want to make sure we have maternity cover.
We are both on the Essential Care plan (policy POL-IE-667788).
Could you confirm if maternity cover is included, what the waiting period is if any, and whether private room cover in a maternity hospital is included?

Best regards,
Brendan McCarthy

My wife and I are planning to start a family and I want to make sure we have maternity cover.

Best regards,
Brendan McCarthy

subject: Does my policy cover the Affidea radiology clinic?
body_text:
Hello,

I have been referred by my consultant for a CT scan.
The referral is to Affidea Radiology, which I believe is a private outpatient imaging centre.
I am wondering if this centre is covered under my Select Hospital plan (policy POL-IE-778899) or if I should ask my consultant to refer me somewhere else.
Could you confirm as soon as possible as my appointment is scheduled for next week?

Regards,
Grainne Hennessy
body_html:
Hello,

I have been referred by my consultant for a CT scan.
The referral is to Affidea Radiology, which I believe is a private outpatient imaging centre.

Regards,
Grainne Hennessy

subject: Complaint about delayed claim processing
body_text:
Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to formally complain about the completely unacceptable delay in processing my claim CLM-20251120.
The claim was submitted on 20 November 2025 for inpatient surgery and I have still not received payment after over three months.
I have called your helpline twice and was told each time that the claim is 'under review'. This is not acceptable.
I am requesting immediate escalation, a written explanation of the delay, and a timeline for payment.
Policy: POL-IE-889900.

Yours sincerely,
Aisling Connolly
body_html:
Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to formally complain about the completely unacceptable delay in processing my claim CLM-20251120.
The claim was submitted on 20 November 2025 for inpatient surgery and I have still not received payment after over three months.
I have called your helpline twice and was told each time that the claim is 'under review'. This is not acceptable.
I am requesting immediate escalation, a written explanation of the delay, and a timeline for payment.
Policy: POL-IE-889900.

Yours sincerely,
Aisling Connolly

subject: Very unhappy with customer service experience
body_text:
Hello,

I am writing to express my deep dissatisfaction with the service I received when I called your customer support line last Thursday.
I was on hold for 47 minutes, then the agent was dismissive and failed to resolve my query about a claim that has been sitting unprocessed for six weeks.
This level of service is completely at odds with what I expected when I signed up. I want a formal written apology and an explanation of what went wrong.
My policy number is POL-IE-001122.

Regards,
Conor Sheehan
body_html:
Hello,

I am writing to express my deep dissatisfaction with the service I received when I called your customer support line last Thursday.
I was on hold for 47 minutes, then the agent was dismissive and failed to resolve my query about a claim that has been sitting unprocessed for six weeks.
This level of service is completely at odds with what I expected when I signed up. I want a formal written apology and an explanation of what went wrong.
My policy number is POL-IE-001122.

Regards,
Conor Sheehan

subject: Complaint - denied pre-auth for medically necessary procedure
body_text:
To Whom It May Concern,

I wish to make a formal complaint regarding the refusal of my pre-authorisation request for a spinal fusion procedure.
My consultant, Dr. Brian Flanagan at Mater Private, has written a clear medical necessity letter supporting the procedure, yet your team rejected the request citing 'non-covered procedure'.
This procedure is critical to my quality of life and I am asking for an immediate review and reversal of the decision.
I am also considering contacting the Financial Services and Pensions Ombudsman if this is not resolved.
Policy: POL-IE-113344.

Sincerely,
Orla Higgins
body_html:
To Whom It May Concern,

I wish to make a formal complaint regarding the refusal of my pre-authorisation request for a spinal fusion procedure.
My consultant, Dr. Brian Flanagan at Mater Private, has written a clear medical necessity letter supporting the procedure, yet your team rejected the request citing 'non-covered procedure'.
This procedure is critical to my quality of life and I am asking for an immediate review and reversal of the decision.
I am also considering contacting the Financial Services and Pensions Ombudsman if this is not resolved.
Policy: POL-IE-113344.

Sincerely,
Orla Higgins

subject: Billing mistake on my account - overcharged twice
body_text:
Hello,

I have noticed what appears to be a billing error on my account.
I was charged EUR 198.00 on 1 March 2026 and again on 3 March 2026, both described as 'monthly premium'.
My monthly premium should only be EUR 198.00 so it appears I have been double-charged.
Could you urgently investigate and arrange a refund?
My direct debit is set up on my AIB account and policy number is POL-IE-224455.

Thanks,
Liam Keogh
body_html:

I have noticed what appears to be a billing error on my account.

Could you urgently investigate and arrange a refund?
My direct debit is set up on my AIB account and policy number is POL-IE-224455.

Thanks,
Liam Keogh

I received a notification that my direct debit payment of EUR 345.00 failed this month because I recently switched bank accounts.
I want to update my bank details and also understand what happens to my cover in the meantime - will there be a grace period?

subject: Interested in joining - new member enquiry
body_text:
Hello,

I am a 32-year-old software engineer currently without health insurance and I am interested in taking out a policy.
I am single and in good health. Could you let me know what plan would best suit me, the current pricing, and how quickly cover would commence?
I am particularly interested in outpatient GP visits and consultant cover.

Regards,
Kevin O'Dwyer

subject: Family health insurance - what are my options?
body_text:
Hi,

My husband and I are looking to get health insurance cover for our family of four (two adults and two children aged 6 and 9).
We are currently on a corporate scheme through my employer but that scheme is ending and we need to arrange our own policy by 1 June 2026.
Could you send us information on your family plans, pricing and any first-year discounts available?

Thanks,
Emer Lawlor
body_html:
Hi,

My husband and I are looking to get health insurance cover for our family of four (two adults and two children aged 6 and 9).
We are currently on a corporate scheme through my employer but that scheme is ending and we need to arrange our own policy by 1 June 2026.
Could you send us information on your family plans, pricing and any first-year discounts available?

Thanks,
Emer Lawlor

subject: Returning from abroad - rejoining scheme
body_text:
Hello,

I lived in Australia for four years and have just returned to Ireland permanently.
I previously held a policy with you (I believe my old policy number was POL-IE-102030 but it lapsed in 2022).
I am now 38 years old and want to rejoin. I understand there may be a Lifetime Community Rating loading.
Could you confirm the loading that would apply and what plans are available at that rate?

Best,
Mark Dempsey
body_html:
Hello,

I lived in Australia for four years and have just returned to Ireland permanently.
I previously held a policy with you (I believe my old policy number was POL-IE-102030 but it lapsed in 2022).
I am now 38 years old and want to rejoin. I understand there may be a Lifetime Community Rating loading.
Could you confirm the loading that would apply and what plans are available at that rate?

Best,
Mark Dempsey

body_text:

I am delighted to share that my daughter Saoirse was born on 22 February 2026.
I would like to add her to my existing family policy (POL-IE-779900) as a dependent.

Kind regards,
Fionnuala Reilly

I would like to add my elderly mother (Bridie Farrell, DOB 12 March 1951) to my existing health insurance policy.
She currently has no cover and has some pre-existing conditions including Type 2 diabetes and hypertension.
Could you let me know if this is possible, what waiting periods would apply to her pre-existing conditions, and what the additional premium would be?

Thanks,
Donal Farrell

subject: Request to cancel my policy - moving abroad
body_text:
Dear Support Team,

I am writing to request the cancellation of my health insurance policy (POL-IE-435566) effective 31 March 2026.
I am relocating permanently to Canada for work and will no longer need Irish health cover.
Could you please confirm the cancellation process, any notice period required, and whether I am entitled to a pro-rata refund for the remaining months?

Thank you,
Una Mulcahy

Thank you,
Una Mulcahy

Costello Insurance Brokers

subject: Broker access portal - account not working
body_text:
Hi,

I am a registered broker with your company (broker code BKR-00892) and I am having difficulty accessing the broker portal.
When I try to log in, I receive an 'account suspended' error message. I need access urgently to manage several client renewals that are due this week.
Could you please reactivate my account or explain why it was suspended?

Thank you,
Mary Kinsella
Insurance Solutions Ltd
body_html:
Hi,

I am a registered broker with your company (broker code BKR-00892) and I am having difficulty accessing the broker portal.
When I try to log in, I receive an 'account suspended' error message. I need access urgently to manage several client renewals that are due this week.
Could you please reactivate my account or explain why it was suspended?

Thank you,
Mary Kinsella
Insurance Solutions Ltd

subject: General question about your complaints process
body_text:
Hello,

I want to find out about your formal complaints process.
I had a negative experience recently with a claim that was rejected and I want to understand how to lodge a formal complaint and what the timeline is.
I also want to know whether I can escalate to the Financial Services and Pensions Ombudsman if I am not satisfied with the outcome.

Regards,
Brigid Costigan

I want to find out about your formal complaints process.

Regards,
Brigid Costigan

subject: Will my insurance cover fertility treatment at the Rotunda?
body_text:
Hello,

I am wondering whether fertility treatment is covered under my HealthWise Gold plan.
Specifically, I am asking about IVF treatment at the Rotunda Hospital in Dublin.
If covered, could you let me know the extent of cover, any waiting periods, and whether a GP referral is required?
Policy: POL-IE-768899.

Thank you,
Eithne Moran

subject: How do I renew online and is there a discount?
body_text:
Hi there,

My renewal is due on 15 April 2026.
I would prefer to renew online rather than calling in. Could you tell me how to do this through the member portal?
Also, I have been a member for 12 years without making a claim - is there any loyalty discount or no-claims bonus available?
Policy number: POL-IE-879900.

Thanks,
Barry Foley

subject: Downgrading plan at renewal - what are my options?
body_text:
Dear Renewals Team,

I am due to renew in April and I am considering downgrading from my current Select Hospital plan to a more affordable option.
I have been on this plan for seven years but the premium has become difficult to manage.
Could you walk me through the available downgrade options, what benefits I would lose, and any minimum waiting periods that might apply to the new plan?
Policy: POL-IE-980011.

Best wishes,
Jacinta Sullivan

subject: Claim for back surgery - multiple invoices
body_text:
Hello,

I had spinal decompression surgery at Beacon Hospital on 5 December 2025. The surgeon was Mr. Ronan O'Grady.
I am attaching four invoices: hospital facility fee (EUR 12,500), anaesthesia (EUR 1,800), surgical assistant (EUR 600), and pre-operative MRI (EUR 750). Total: EUR 15,650.
Could you please confirm receipt of all four invoices and advise the expected processing time?
Policy: POL-IE-091223, Member: MEM-004141.

Regards,
Gerard Harrington

Policy: POL-IE-091223, Member: MEM-004141.

subject: Reimbursement query - very large claim outstanding
body_text:
Dear Claims Team,

I submitted a claim for inpatient cardiac surgery in October 2025 totalling EUR 42,000.
I received a partial payment of only EUR 18,500 in December, with no explanation for the shortfall.
I believe I am entitled to a higher reimbursement under my HealthWise Gold plan and I am requesting a full detailed breakdown of what was covered and what was rejected.
This is a very significant amount and I expect a response within 5 working days.
Policy: POL-IE-182334.

Sincerely,
Patricia Maguire

Sincerely,

subject: Random question about cover abroad - going on holiday
body_text:
Hello,

I am travelling to Spain for three weeks in July and am wondering if my health insurance policy gives me any cover while abroad.
I know there is the EHIC card but I was wondering if my private policy provides any additional top-up coverage for medical emergencies in the EU.
Policy: POL-IE-273445.

Thanks,
Thomas Daly

subject: Complaint about agent misinformation on claim outcome
body_text:
Dear Customer Relations,

I am making a formal complaint about incorrect information I received from one of your agents on 28 February 2026.
I was told my claim for laser eye surgery would be covered, so I went ahead with the procedure at a cost of EUR 3,200.
The claim has now been rejected on the grounds that laser eye surgery is not covered under my plan.
The agent's misinformation has cost me EUR 3,200 out of pocket. I am requesting compensation and a review of this matter.
Policy: POL-IE-364556.

Yours sincerely,
Helen Donoghue
body_html:
Dear Customer Relations,

I am making a formal complaint about incorrect information I received from one of your agents on 28 February 2026.
I was told my claim for laser eye surgery would be covered, so I went ahead with the procedure at a cost of EUR 3,200.
The claim has now been rejected on the grounds that laser eye surgery is not covered under my plan.
The agent's misinformation has cost me EUR 3,200 out of pocket. I am requesting compensation and a review of this matter.
Policy: POL-IE-364556.

Yours sincerely,
Helen Donoghue

body_text:

I recently got married and need to update the name on my health insurance policy.
I was Dermot Murphy and am now Dermot Neville (took my husband's name).
I have attached a copy of my marriage certificate as proof.
Could you process the name change on policy POL-IE-455667?

Thank you,
Dermot Neville

subject: Pre-auth for bariatric surgery - waiting for approval
body_text:
Dear Medical Review Team,

I submitted a pre-authorisation request on 15 February 2026 for bariatric (weight loss) surgery at St Vincent's Private Hospital.
My consultant is Mr. David Keane and the surgery is provisionally scheduled for 10 April 2026.
I have not received a decision yet and my surgery date is approaching. Could you provide an urgent update on the status of my pre-authorisation application?
Policy: POL-IE-566778, Member: MEM-004646.

Thank you,
Nora Shanahan

The total amount was EUR 7,800 and I have all original receipts and discharge papers.
Could you advise whether this claim can still be processed or if the time limit has passed?
Policy: POL-IE-899001.

Regards,
Brendan Thornton

subject: Coverage query and possible complaint about waiting time
body_text:
Hello,

I have two issues I want to raise. First, I would like to understand whether outpatient speech and language therapy for my child is covered under the Family Plus plan (policy POL-IE-900112).
Second, I am quite frustrated because I have been waiting 11 weeks for a response to a pre-authorisation request I made in early January and have received no update whatsoever.
This level of non-communication is simply not acceptable and I would like both issues addressed.

Yours faithfully,
Attracta Fleming
